title: Phase 1: read-only live dashboard (FastAPI, localhost)
source: CEO request 2026-05-29: live web dashboard to monitor the service + active strategy; explicitly think ahead to a control plane (expose actions/functions, portfolio mgmt, corporate actions, multi-strategy). Stack approved: FastAPI+uvicorn+Jinja/htmx.
why: Observe the running service with zero risk: read signals/live/survival_book/*.json + logs, render equity/HWM/drawdown, day P&L (vs sod_equity), dd_latched/book_active, leverage vs cap, effective bets, target weights/positions table, equity-curve chart, fills + error tails, and a staleness/heartbeat indicator (risk_state.json mtime). Bind 127.0.0.1 only; no broker calls; resilient to torn reads (degrade, never crash).
scope: webapp/state_reader.py: resilient snapshot reader (defensive json, derived metrics, staleness).
webapp/templates/dashboard.html: auto-refresh (vanilla fetch poll), inline SVG equity sparkline.
scripts/dashboard_run.bat launcher; tests for the reader + endpoints (TestClient).

history.reason: Phase-1 read-only dashboard built (FastAPI, localhost:8765), 9 TDD tests, smoke-validated against the live armed service: pid/heartbeat/leverage-vs-cap/ENB/drawdown/day-PnL/positions/weights/fills/equity-curve all render. service.pid now written by run_survival_live on loop start (fixed stale-pid ops wart).
feat(dashboard): phase-1 read-only live monitor (FastAPI) for the survival book
